name: Fossal S.A.A.
summary: Fossal S.A.A., through its subsidiary Fosfatos del Pac√É¬≠fico S.A., engages in the exploitation of phosphate rock in Peru. It holds interests in the Diatomite concession in the Bayovar 9 area located in the North coast of Peru. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Lima, Peru. Fossal S.A.A. is a subsidiary of Inversiones ASPI S.A.
